annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Md. Const. Art. III, sec. 57 — 6% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Maryland’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
